evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Create and maintain a suite of dbt tests to ensure data quality, consistency, and trustworthiness; data quality, modelling best practice
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-focused: emphasis on testing ownership, data quality, dimensional modelling principles, and best practices as core responsibilities.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: subscription media business affects business decisions but lacks explicit financial/regulatory language.
evidence.collaboration_width: data analysts; data engineers; business stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (dbt, Databricks, Delta Live Tables), dedicated data function, growing toward self-serve analytics.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and implement dbt models on Databricks; Create and maintain a suite of dbt tests; support conversational analytics tooling
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: precise technical context (dbt on Databricks, dimensional modelling, conversational analytics) with clear methodology.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: subscriptions and content data; self-serve analytics; conversational analytics tools
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product-focused: primary mission is enabling self-serve, data-driven decisions for business stakeholders on product/subscription metrics.
evidence.autonomy_level: Provide subject matter expertise to shape data modelling strategy; Serve as subject matter expert; Provide guidance on best practices
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: owns data modelling strategy direction, mentors team on practices, shapes evolution of data platform.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-infrastructure expected; conversational analytics are downstream of candidate's work, not their use.
evidence.testing_framing: Create and maintain a suite of dbt tests to ensure data quality, consistency, and trustworthiness
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: testing is framed as owned accountability with explicit quality and trustworthiness goals.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data quality, consistency, and trustworthiness; well-tested data models; clear lineage back to source
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High loss aversion: building toward 3M subscribers by 2030 with data as central ambition; trustworthiness and quality are primary.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Contribute to the ongoing evolution of our data platform; build out self-serve and conversational analytics capability
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mixed: moving from reactive reporting to proactive insights; both evolving existing platform and building new self-serve capabilities.
evidence.loss_aversion: Build data products with clear lineage back to source; create and maintain dbt tests for trustworthiness — preventing bad data reaching 3M users.
